title: Ponc Gavrisom
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image=[[File:Calibop.jpg]] |name=Ponc Gavrisom |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Calibop]]''[[Specter of the Past]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers=Yellow |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Pale blue]] |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]''[[Vision of the Future]]'' **[[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|But there are many in the New Republic who believe that Calibops are skilled at words and nothing more. Perhaps the time for words has ended, and the time for action has arrived.|Ponc Gavrisom|}} '''Ponc Gavrisom''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Calibop]] who served as the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who was elected to fulfill the remainder of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] term following her resignation from office. Gavrisom was known as a calm mediator as [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]]. Gavrisom came to be known in galactic history as bringing a lasting peace between the New Republic and [[Imperial Remnant]] as a signatory of the [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|Bastion Accords]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]] with [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] which marked an official ending to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] aboard the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Would sacrificing one life to prevent it have been such a bad bargain?''"
"''That is a question all beings eventually ask themselves. For those who wish to remain civilized, there can be only one answer.|Borsk Fey'lya and Ponc Gavrisom|}} Elected to the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], Gavrisom gained popularity as a calm mediator in Senate proceedings and stood as a staunch supporter of [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. Following Organa Solo's post-[[Corellian Crisis|Corellian Insurrection]] hiatus in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], Gavrisom was elected by the Senate to fulfill the remainder of Organa Solo's term. During this time, the [[Caamas Document]] crisis nearly crippled the New Republic, and Gavrisom vainly attempted to unify the shattered coalition. He pointed out that Organa Solo was only on leave from the position of Chief of State and that she could be reinstated by a majority vote of the Senate. But she declined his offer to stand aside, on the assumption that changing the voice of the New Republic in the middle of the crisis would be a bad move. In orbit at [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]], Han and Lando discovered the three cloaked Star Destroyers waiting to pounce on the ships after the battle. Leia took control of the Ishori war cruiser she and the President were on to go to aid Han. A move made retroactively legal when the President, his faith in her unshaken, used an obscure law in order to take command of the ship. When the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial fleet]] revealed itself, Leia advised Gavrisom to find a leader both sides of the Caamas argument could rally behind. Gavrisom reinstated General [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], who led the combined fleet in forcing the Star Destroyers to retreat. [[File:Gavrisompellaeon.jpg|thumb|left|270px|Gavrisom and Pellaeon]] A few weeks later, Gavrisom signed the [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|peace accords]] with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], ending the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Gavrisom was critical in healing the wounds between the New Republic and the [[Imperial Remnant]], helping Pellaeon create a new of peace, joining [[Talon Karrde]]'s joint information program. Gavrisom also healed the wounds that the Caamas Document crisis brought, and teamed up with [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Borsk Fey'lya]] to end dissent in the Senate. He presided over the signing of the peace accords with the Imperial Remnant, and resigned his office to Organa Solo upon her [[New Republic Presidential election, 21 ABY|return]] in [[21 ABY/Legends|21 ABY]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] considered Gavrisom overly verbose and referred to him as "Puffers". Reversely, [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] was a staunch supporter of Gavrisom. It was one of the handful of things they disagreed on. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Ponc Gavrisom}} *''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} ==Sources== *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *{{FactFile|94|FEY 1-2|Borsk Fey'lya}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{NRCOS}} {{Interlang |de=Ponc Gavrisom |es=Ponc Gavrisom |ja=ポンク・ギャヴリソム }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Gavrisom, Ponc}} [[Category:Calibops]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:New Republic Chiefs of State]] [[Category:New Republic Senators]]
